$comment: This file is generated from Zod schemas in @asteroid-miner/model. Do not edit by hand. Run `pnpm --filter @asteroid-miner/model generate-schemas` to regenerate.

name.description: Unique name for this data pack. Must be unique across all loaded packs.

type.description: What kind of data pack this is. "base" is the core game data. "dlc" is for official DLCs. "mod" is for mods.

files.description: Paths to def files shipped by this pack, relative to the pack root.

gameVersion.description: Minimum game version this pack requires. Semver (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH).

nameKey.description: i18n key for the display name.

description: Manifest format for data packs. The base game, DLCs, and community mods all use this format.
